title: AppDynamics Database Collector
description: Schema representing an AppDynamics Database Visibility collector configuration for monitoring database instances.

id.description: The internal configuration ID for the database collector.

name.description: The display name for the database collector.

type.description: The type of database being monitored.

hostname.description: The hostname or IP address of the database server.

port.description: The port number for the database connection.

username.description: The username for authenticating with the database.

password.description: The password for authenticating with the database. Only used in create and update requests.

databaseName.description: The name of the specific database to monitor.

enabled.description: Whether the database collector is enabled and actively monitoring.

agentName.description: The name of the Database Agent responsible for this collector.

excludedSchemas.description: List of schema names to exclude from monitoring.
